effectEN:
[AUTO](VC/RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, Soul Charge (1).
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a unit with "Drajeweled" in its card name, Soul Charge (1), and if your soul has three or more cards with different grades, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: An overwhelming wave of demonic power that prevents anyone from coming near...

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your ride phase, you may put this card into your soul.
flavorTextEN: It is said that once a tone is played, it will resound for all eternity.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at three cards from the top of your deck, choose a card from among them, put it into your soul, shuffle your deck, and if your soul has four or more cards with different grades, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks while not boosted, if your vanguard is "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon", choose up to four normal units with "Desire Devil" in their card names from your drop, and if you chose one or more cards, return them to your deck and shuffle it. If you returned four cards, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit attacks, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater and your soul has four or more cards with different grades, until end of turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
[AUTO](RC):When you Soul Blast (4) or more at the same time for your vanguard's ability's cost, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], [Stand] this unit.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from your soul, if you have a vanguard with "Bruce" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn for every two cards in your damage zone.
flavorTextEN: Threading closely to the line makes it more exciting, right?

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a card from your drop, and put it into your soul. Then, if your soul has four or more cards with different grades, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The swirling miasma is condensed and made into a demonic stone that shines in rainbow colors.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks while boosted, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, you may draw a card. If you do, choose a card from your hand, and put it into your soul.
flavorTextEN: The view becomes really great, once everything has been flattened.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you have a vanguard with "Baromagnes" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for each card in your soul.
flavorTextEN: Wielders of special abilities will attract each other and continue to heighten their powers.

effectEN: [CONT](Back Row RC):During your turn, if your soul has six or more cards, this unit gets "Boost", and if your soul has twelve or more cards, it gets [Power]+10000. (If your soul has five or less cards after boosting, this unit can still continue to boost)
flavorTextEN: You'll be the only one dirtying their hands. Now go.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):1/Turn :When this unit attacks a grade 3 or greater unit, if your soul has four or more cards with different grades, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](RC):When you Soul Blast (4) or more cards at the same time for the cost of your vanguard's ability, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and [Stand] this unit. (Can only be used if you Soul Blast (4) or more cards at once)
flavorTextEN: Never let your guard down or leave an opening.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put a grade 0 card from your hand into your soul], choose a grade 1 card from your soul, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: It'll change, into the form that I wish it to.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks while not boosted, if your vanguard is "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon", choose up to four normal units with "Desire Devil" in their card names from your drop, and if you chose one or more cards, return them to your deck and shuffle it. If you returned four cards, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: It's not like I'm lonely. Rather, it's more fun when I'm alone!?

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at three cards from the top of your deck, choose a card from among them, put it into your soul, shuffle your deck, and if your soul has four or more cards with different grades, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: A toneless quartet is a prelude that invites destruction.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a grade 3 with "Chronojet" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], search your deck for up to one grade 3 unit card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: It is said that countless futures were projected beyond the deeply fogged vision.

effectEN: [CONT](RC) Generation Break 1 (Active if you have one or more face up G units in total on your (VC) or G zone):When this unit attacks a vanguard, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. At the end of that battle, COST  [put this unit on the bottom of your deck], search your deck for up to one grade 1 card, call it to a back row (RC), and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: Rewinding time, in search of an unexplored future.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks while boosted, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The job is not just about carrying balls around.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Shield]+5000 until end of that battle. If you have a face up card in your G zone, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 instead of +5000.
flavorTextEN: A long, long time ago, an observer of time from another world came to this planet.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [put a card from your hand into your soul], and draw a card.
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have a vanguard with "Luquier" in its card name, and two or more of your units were placed on (RC) from soul this turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000, and if four or more were placed, gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: The performance of a demonic dragon of thorns that traps the audience in a whirlpool of excitement.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a unit with only <Pale Moon> for its clan, Soul Charge (1), choose a card from your soul, and put it into your hand.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) or put on (GC), if you have a vanguard with "Luquier" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000/[Shield]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The marionette will continue to dance until the day these bonds becomes disconnected.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your soul has eight or more cards with different card names, this unit gets "Boost", and [Power]+5000.
[CONT](RC/GC):If your soul has eight or more cards with different card names, this unit can intercept from the back row, and gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: No one is allowed to catch up to the diversity of art of a technical Wild Master.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards with "Luquier" in its card name, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if you have a vanguard with "Luquier" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Shield]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: With adoration as motivation, she climbs her way up to the seat of a star.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is put into your soul by your card's ability during your turn, if your vanguard is a [Glitter], choose one of your vanguards, it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Oh thick and intense grudge of mine, carve yourself into the depths of the soul.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if you have a vanguard with "Baromagnes" in its card name, COST  [put another rear-guard into soul], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and put it into their soul. If you could not put an opponent's rear-guard into their soul, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC/GC):If you are in "Final Burst", this unit gets [Power]+10000/[Shield]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard is "Diabolos, "Viamance" Bruce", COST  [Counter Blast (1)], Soul Charge (1), choose up to one grade 3 or less normal unit with "Diabolos" in its card name from your soul, and call it to an open (RC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](Front Row RC):When you Soul Blast (4) or more at the same time for the cost of your vanguard's ability, if your unit did not [Stand] by a card's ability this turn, you may [Stand] this unit. If you [Stand] this unit, at the end of that turn, COST  [retire this unit], choose a grade 2 or greater unit card from your soul, and put it into your hand. (The effect at the end of turn can only be used if this card was [Stand] by its effect)
flavorTextEN: A single hand-made flower is given to you, who disappears into ashes.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a card from your drop, and put it into your soul. Then, if your soul has four or more cards with different grades, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The swirling miasma is condensed and made into a demonic stone that shines in rainbow colors.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you have a vanguard with "Baromagnes" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for each card in your soul.
flavorTextEN: Wielders of special abilities will attract each other and continue to heighten their powers.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a unit with "Astroea" in its card name, choose a "Almajestar, Schwart゠Sparda" from your soul, and call that card and this card to (RC).
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :If you have a vanguard with "Almajestar" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose two trigger units from your drop, put them into soul, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Almajestar" in its card name, choose two trigger units from your drop, and put them into soul.
[CONT](RC/GC):If you have a Critical Trigger on your bind zone, this unit gets [Power]+5000/[Shield]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If you persona rode this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a total of up to three of you and your opponent's rear-guards, and you and your opponent put them into the soul. This unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn for each card chosen with this effect. ("If you persona rode" is active even if persona ride activated outside normal riding)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your bind zone has two or more trigger units, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](Soul):If you did not ride this turn, this card gets grade +2
[AUTO](Soul):When your grade 3 or greater vanguard attacks, if you did not ride this turn, COST  [bind this card], and all of your front row units get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Rest does not come to the soul filled with rage.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is put from (RC) into your soul by the ability of your vanguard with "Greedon" in its card name, choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and you may retire it.
[AUTO](Soul):When your vanguard with "Greedon" in its card name attacks, COST  [bind this card], and until end of that battle, when your opponent would call cards from their hand to (GC), they must call two or more at the same time.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), choose one of your vanguards, and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn for every two of that unit's grade.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if you have a vanguard with "Baromagnes" in its card name, COST  [put another rear-guard into soul], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and put it into soul. If your opponent's rear-guard was not put into soul, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: I'll have you join us..... Until these flames are satisfied.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your soul has eight or more cards with different card names, this unit gets "Boost", and [Power]+5000.
[CONT](RC/GC):If your soul has eight or more cards with different card names, this unit can intercept from the back row, and gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: No one is allowed to catch up to the diversity of art of a technical Wild Master.

nameEN: Black Sky Thunder Quaking Queen, Leimina
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your ride phase, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & put this card on the bottom of deck], and draw a card.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if you persona rode this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a card from your soul, and call it to (RC). If you called a card, you may Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your (RC) without any Dragontree markers, and put a Dragontree marker. Search your deck for up to one "Masque of Hydragrum", reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC/GC):If your vanguard is "Xeno Almajestar, Astroea゠Bico Masques", this unit gets [Power]+5000/[Shield]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: Enchanted by the stars. More than the fleeting flow of time.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If this unit is on a (RC) with a Dragontree marker, this unit gets "[AUTO]:When this unit intercepts, this unit gets [Shield]+5000 until end of that battle.", and [Power]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have three or more Dragontree markers on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a grade 3 or less card from your soul, and call it to (RC).
flavorTextEN: Me and me, which do you want to be eaten by?

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you have a vanguard with "Drajeweled" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle. At the end of that battle, if you Soul Blast (4) or more cards at the same time for the cost of your vanguard's ability this turn, COST  [retire this unit], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):If you are in "Final Burst", this unit gets [Power]+10000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if you are in "Final Rush", COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and move it to (GC). If you are in "Final Burst", choose two cards instead of one.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
Choose one of your vanguards being attacked, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle. If a trigger unit was Soul Blast for this cost, it gets +20000 instead of +10000.
flavorTextEN: The last ingredient is...... eh, it's me!?

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is put from (RC) or hand into the soul by your vanguard's ability, you may Soul Charge (1).
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from soul by your vanguard's ability, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is put from (RC) into soul by the ability of your vanguard with "Greedon" in its card name, choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and you may retire it.
[AUTO](Soul):When your vanguard with "Greedon" in its card name attacks, COST  [bind this card], and until end of that battle, when your opponent would call cards from their hand to (GC), they must call two or more at the same time.
flavorTextEN: Tainted neighs that spread impurities.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is put into the soul by your card's ability, if your vanguard's clan is only «Pale Moon», COST  [bind this card], search your deck or drop for up to one grade 3 card, put it into your soul. If you searched your deck, shuffle the deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](Deck):If you have a vanguard with "Greedon" in its card name, this card is also regarded as the same name as all of the cards in your soul with "Desire Devil" in their card names.
[CONT](RC/GC):If your soul has three or more cards with "Desire Devil" in their card names, this unit gets [Power]+5000/[Shield]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) by your vanguard's ability, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], draw a card, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, if your vanguard is grade 4 or greater, Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from your hand]!
Soul Charge (3). Then, if your soul has ten or more cards, choose a card from your soul, and you may put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](VC):If your soul has an "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon", the number of cards in your damage zone for you to lose becomes seven.
[AUTO](VC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, COST  [Soul Blast (2) & put four [Stand] rear-guards into your soul], and [Stand] this unit. If your soul has ten or more cards, this unit gets [Power]+15000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Ah~, that's not filling at all. Let me have your body as well!

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Soul Charge (1). Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn for every five cards in your soul. If your soul has ten or more cards, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Stand atop the stage that is the battlefield. Even so, the weak cannot triumph.

effectEN: [AUTO](VC/RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. If you are in "Final Rush", it gets +15000 instead of +5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO](VC):At the start of your Ride Phase, you "Final Rush".(Specific units get a power up when you are in "Final Rush"!)
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, if you are in "Final Rush", COST  [Soul Blast (5)], and [Stand] all of your front row rear-guards.
flavorTextEN: Come at me seriously! Or you won't be able to withstand my full power!

effectEN:
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, you may Soul Charge (2).
flavorTextEN: His dragon is a "guillotine". An inescapable manifestation of death.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Draw a card, choose a card from your hand, and call it to (RC). Then, if you are in "Final Rush", all of your front row units get [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: We'll settle it with this play! Don't hold back anything now!

effectEN:
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and perform all of the following according to the number of cards in your soul.
•5 or more ‐ Draw a card.
•10 or more ‐ This unit gets [Power]+10000/[Critical]+1 until end of that battle.
•15 or more ‐ Both you and your opponent put all of your own rear-guards into your souls. Choose up to two cards from your soul, call them to (RC), and those units get [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Until either side falls! That's what battle is, right?

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if your soul has ten or more cards, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], and until end of that battle, when your opponent would call cards from their hand to (GC), they must call two or more at the same time.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard is "Master of Gravity, Baromagnes", Soul Charge (2).
[ACT](RC):If your soul has ten or more cards, COST  [Counter Blast (2)], and all of your front row units get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: With the restoration of the world, the circus bustled with activities for days.

effectEN: Choose a "Diabolos, "Violence" Bruce" on your (VC) or (RC), and it gets [Power]+20000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If your vanguard is "Master of Gravity, Baromagnes", this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If your soul has four or less cards, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from your hand]!
Soul Charge (3). Then, if your soul has ten or more cards, choose a card from your soul, and you may put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: It's time you returned what I had left with you.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [put a card from your hand into your soul], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: The Zodiac Time Beasts entrusted all their power to the great hero.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), Soul Charge (1). Then, if you are in "Final Rush", COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+15000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The guardsman that maintains order during the match... may be putting it too highly.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit attacks, if you are in "Final Rush", COST  [put one of your other rear-guards into your soul], draw a card, Soul Charge (1), and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This is tonight's climax! Be dazzled, Acrobat Maximum!

effectEN: [AUTO](VC/RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. If you are in "Final Rush", it gets +15000 instead of +5000.
flavorTextEN: From now til the end of the match, I'll not let you touch the ball.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Soul Charge (4). Then, if you are in "Final Rush", perform all of the following according to the number of cards in your soul.
•6 or more - Draw a card.
•8 or more - All of your front row units get [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
•12 or more - Choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Tactics born from the pinnacle of cunning, confirm their overwhelming lead to victory.

effectEN: Choose a "Diabolos, "Violence" Bruce" on your (VC) or (RC), and it gets [Power]+20000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: With the burst of yells behind their back, the ace springs forth.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If your soul has four or less cards, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Dark States is governed by the descendants of the great hero.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [put a card from your hand into your soul], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: The Zodiac Time Beasts entrusted all their power to the great hero.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if your soul has ten or more cards, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], and until end of that battle, when your opponent would call cards from their hand to (GC), they must call two or more at the same time.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (2)], until end of turn, all of your front row units get [Power]+5000, and if you are in "Final Rush", choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Critical]+1.
flavorTextEN: The team morale is at its peak. There is no doubt in victory again today.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[ACT](RC):If you are in "Final Rush", COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], and until end of turn, when this unit would attack, it battles all of your opponent's front row units.
flavorTextEN: The unstoppable charge dominates the field.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn for each of your [Stand] rear-guards. If your damage zone has five or more cards, it gets +5000 instead of +2000.
flavorTextEN: The evil emotions that have been piling up, become a shriek that splits heads!

effectEN: [AUTO](Soul):When your "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon" is placed on (VC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and call this card to (RC). (Does not activate if you ride when this card is on (VC))
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If your vanguard is "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon", COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from your hand], choose a grade 3 or less card from your soul, and call it to (RC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If your vanguard is "Master of Gravity, Baromagnes", COST  [put a card from your hand into your soul], and all of your front row units get [Power]+5000 until end of turn. If your soul has ten or more cards, they get +10000 instead of +5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your rear-guard [Stand], if you are in "Final Rush", this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. (Including this unit)
flavorTextEN: Carve the furrow of victory onto the field.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [discard a card from your hand]!
Counter Charge (1). If you are in "Final Rush", draw two cards, choose up to two cards from your hand, call them to (RC), and they get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: A maelstrom of attacks began in the midst of loud cheering.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (2)], until end of turn, all of your front row units get [Power]+5000, and if you are in "Final Rush", choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Critical]+1.
flavorTextEN: The team morale is at its peak. There is no doubt in victory again today.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If your vanguard is "Master of Gravity, Baromagnes", COST  [put a card from your hand into your soul], and all of your front row units get [Power]+5000 until end of turn. If your soul has ten or more cards, they get +10000 instead of +5000.
flavorTextEN: Split the heavens, and rupture all with thunder.

effectEN: [AUTO](Soul):When "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon" is placed on your (VC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and call this card to (RC). (Cannot be activated if this card on (VC) is rode upon)
flavorTextEN: It's a bear trying to ride on the winning horse.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If your vanguard is "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon", COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from your hand], choose a grade 3 or less card from your soul, and call it to (RC).
flavorTextEN: Not enough! This is nowhere near enough!

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Discard a card from your hand], look at the top three cards of your deck, choose one card from among them, put it into your hand, choose up to one unit card from among them, call it to (RC), and put the rest into your soul.
[AUTO](VC): When this unit attacks a vanguard, if your soul has eight or more cards with different card names, choose one of your rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn. If your soul has thirteen or more cards with different card names, choose all of your rear-guards instead.
[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN: Ahh... Just destroying it is not enough!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you are in "Final Rush", COST  [Counter Blast (1)], Soul Charge (1), choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Trample foes with all of the souls, and push forth straight ahead--

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards with "Bruce" in its card name, and that unit and this unit get [Power]+5000 until end of turn. If you chose a grade 4, Counter Charge (1)/Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this card is placed on (RC) from hand, if your vanguard is "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon", you may Soul Charge (2).
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your soul has two or more "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon", COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Critical]+1 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: It's D-D-D-D-D-D-D-D-Dofund!

effectEN:
[CONT]:The remaining text is currently unknown.
[AUTO](VC):The remaining text is currently unknown.
[CONT](VC):The remaining text is currently unknown.

Slogan: The future is here. The soul of the fourth flame blazes up.

[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a card from your soul, put it into your drop, and increase this unit's [Power] by the original [Shield] of that card put into your drop until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Twisting the time-space, and inverting it.

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and Soul Charge (2). If all of the cards Soul Charge have different grades, you may draw a card.
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [Soul Blast (4) cards with different grades], choose one of your opponent's vanguards, until end of turn, increase or decrease its [Power] to 1, and if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Critical]+1. ([Power] at that time becomes 1, and can increase or decrease afterwards)
flavorTextEN: There is no shame in defeat. It is only logical as I am your opponent.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards with "Bruce" in its card name, and that unit and this unit get [Power]+5000 until end of turn. If you chose a grade 4, Counter Charge (1)/Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: I'll definitely snatch victory with these hands. This is merely a stepping stone for that.

effectEN:
[CONT]:When this card would be rode upon, it is also regarded as "Demonic Jewel Dragon, Drajeweled".
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [Soul Blast (4) cards with different grades], choose one of your opponent's vanguards, until end of turn, increase or decrease its [Power] to 1, and if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Critical]+1. ([Power] at that time becomes 1, and can increase or decrease afterwards)
[CONT](RC):If you Soul Blast (4) or more cards at the same time for the cost of your card's ability this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Do you not understand that resistance is futile?

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you have a vanguard with "Drajeweled" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle. At the end of that battle, put this unit into your soul.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn for each card in your damage zone. If you have a vanguard with "Bruce" in its card name, Soul Charge (1) for every two cards in your damage zone. Choose up to the same number of cards Soul Charge by this effect from your soul, and call them to open (RC).
flavorTextEN: The scythe of the god of death that rapidly approaches the neck. A split second of offense and defense that decides the outcome.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When you Soul Blast (2) or more at the same time for your card's cost, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. If you Soul Blast (3) or more at the same time, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a card from your drop, put it into your soul, choose up to one of your opponent's rear-guards with the same grade as that card, and retire it. (Count the number of Soul Blast for one cost)
flavorTextEN: It is easy to end the conflict. Just end the lives of all the enemies.

effectEN:
[CONT]:You may only have up to one "Demonic Prison Dragon Emperor, Favrnir" in your deck.
[AUTO](VC):At the beginning of your main phase, your opponent chooses one of their rear-guards, retires it, and if you did not ride this turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000/[Critical]+1.
[AUTO](VC):When your opponent's rear-guards is retired during your turn, COST  [put a card from hand into soul], and draw a card.
[AUTO](VC)1/Turn :At the end of the battle this unit attacked, if the sum of the grades of《Dark States》cards in your soul is thirteen or more, COST  [Counter Blast (2)], [Stand] this unit, and this unit gets drive-1 until end of turn.

[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if you Soul Blast (4) or more cards at the same time for the cost of your vanguard's ability this turn, COST  [put a card from hand to soul], draw a card, choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it. (Can only be used if you Soul Blast (4) or more cards at once)
flavorTextEN: I can see through your plans.
